title: Drove ARR expansion from $80M to $120M
narrative: Led product strategy that expanded ARR from $80M to $120M over 24 months by launching two net-new product lines and deepening platform stickiness through a redesigned onboarding flow that reduced time-to-value by 40%.

title: Launched enterprise tier adding $18M in net new ARR
narrative: Conceived and shipped enterprise product tier in 9 months — including SSO, audit logs, and admin controls — generating $18M in net new ARR within 12 months of launch.

title: Scaled product org from 2 to 12 across PM and design
narrative: Grew product and design organization from 2 to 12 people over 3 years; introduced career laddering, quarterly planning, and a design system that cut feature delivery time by 30%.

title: Reduced annual churn from 18% to 9%
narrative: Redesigned the core workflow experience based on 200+ customer interviews and behavioral analytics, reducing annual churn from 18% to 9% and increasing NPS from 28 to 54.

title: Built real-time collaboration features adopted by 70% of accounts
narrative: Shipped real-time collaboration layer — comments, presence, shared views — adopted by 70% of accounts within 90 days, cited as top retention driver in renewal surveys.

title: Led product-led growth motion reducing CAC by 35%
narrative: Designed and executed product-led growth strategy — free tier, in-app upgrade prompts, usage-based triggers — that reduced CAC by 35% and increased self-serve revenue from 8% to 31% of new ARR.

title: Launched partner API program generating $6M pipeline
narrative: Defined and launched a partner API program with 12 integration partners; drove $6M in influenced pipeline within 18 months and expanded addressable market into two adjacent verticals.

title: Re-platformed core data model reducing bug rate by 60%
narrative: Sponsored and managed 18-month re-platforming of the core data model, reducing customer-reported bugs by 60% and enabling a 2x increase in feature release velocity.

title: Built PM hiring process and career framework
narrative: Created the PM hiring rubric, onboarding program, and career framework for a team growing from 2 to 6; reduced new PM ramp time from 6 months to 10 weeks.

title: Took product from 0 to $4M ARR in 18 months
narrative: Joined as first PM, defined the initial product thesis, and shipped MVP in 4 months; grew to $4M ARR and 60 customers in 18 months by iterating tightly on ICP feedback.

title: Defined pricing and packaging that increased ACV by 80%
narrative: Redesigned pricing from flat-rate to usage-tiered model after 40 customer discovery interviews; increased average ACV by 80% with no increase in churn.

title: Hired and onboarded first 3 PMs
narrative: Wrote job descriptions, defined hiring criteria, and onboarded first 3 PMs as company scaled Series A; established product review cadence and roadmap process.

title: Shipped enterprise dashboard adopted by 200+ accounts
narrative: Owned roadmap and delivery for enterprise reporting dashboard; shipped 3 major releases over 2.5 years, with the product adopted by 200+ enterprise accounts and cited in 80% of renewal conversations.

title: Reduced release cycle from quarterly to 6-week sprints
narrative: Partnered with engineering to move from quarterly waterfall releases to 6-week sprints, cutting average time-to-ship by 55% and improving stakeholder satisfaction scores.
